note: Generation: rev_90d is built from log-normal daily_revenue. growth_target by regime: HIGH_RISK: [-1.0, -0.05] LOW_RISK: [0.2, 0.95] NORMAL: [-0.2, 0.3] rev_30d = rev_90d * (1 + growth_target) * uniform(0.97, 1.03) clipped to [500,000, 10,000,000] Nature: short-term 30-day mean revenue.

Generation: daily_revenue ~ LogNormal(log(2,500,000), sigma=0.75) clipped to [500,000, 10,000,000] rev_90d = daily_revenue * uniform(0.85, 1.15), then clipped. Nature: longer-horizon (90-day) baseline mean revenue.
By regime: HIGH_RISK: uniform(5, 30) LOW_RISK: uniform(35, 80) NORMAL: uniform(10, 60) clipped to [5, 80] Nature: POS transaction intensity/activity signal.
Probabilities: NORMAL 0.70, HIGH_RISK 0.15, LOW_RISK 0.15. Nature: latent business regime controlling multiple generation dynamics.
Formula: (Revenue_mean_30d - Revenue_mean_90d) / Revenue_mean_90d, clipped to [-1, 1]. Nature: raw realized revenue growth signal.
Formula: Growth_score = (Growth_value + 1) / 2. Nature: normalized growth score from [-1,1] to [0,1].

Generation: Regime base: HIGH_RISK: [0.4, 0.8] LOW_RISK: [0.02, 0.15] NORMAL: [0.1, 0.4] Tenure adjustments: <2 years: +0.03 to +0.10 >8 years: -0.01 to -0.05 Consistency constraints: Txn_frequency > 60 -> CV <= 0.25 Txn_frequency < 12 -> CV >= 0.45 HIGH_RISK/TRADE_RISK industries -> CV >= 0.30 Nature: cash-flow volatility proxy, core risk signal.
Main formula: CV_score = 1 - min(CV_value / 0.45, 1.0). Extra penalty: if CV_value > 0.6, subtract 0.10 (floored at 0). Nature: cash-flow stability score; higher CV means lower score.
By regime: HIGH_RISK: [1.5, 2.5] LOW_RISK: [1.0, 1.2] NORMAL: [1.0, 1.8] Constraint: if Growth_score > 0.7, cap spike_ratio at 1.4. Nature: dependence on revenue spikes.
Formula: Spike_score = max(0, 1 - (Spike_ratio - 1.0) / 1.2). Nature: spike-stability score; lower spike_ratio gives higher score.
Formula: log(1 + Txn_frequency) / log(81). Nature: log-normalized transaction frequency score in [0,1].
Formula: Years_score = min(years_in_business / 15, 1.0). Nature: operational maturity score.

Base score by group: LOW_RISK: 0.93 MEDIUM_RISK: 0.72 SERVICE_RISK: 0.65 TECHNICAL_RISK: 0.65 HIGH_RISK: 0.35 TRADE_RISK: 0.50 ASSET_BASED: 0.80 Then add uniform noise (-0.05, +0.05), clipped to [0,1]. Nature: structural industry risk score.
